triage_flags.notes: mana_cost: {2}{G} present in frontmatter; green-magic present in tags_filter.

trivia_bullets.text: Grasping Longneck is a common Enchantment Creature — Horror in DSK (released 2024-09-27). Its Enchantment Creature type reflects DSK's design: the horrors of Duskmourn are semi-supernatural, generated by the house itself from fear.

"We ran, but it was all around us — like a writhing, flailing forest of rubbery limbs and stabbing talons." — Survivor's journal. The source is unnamed, attributed only to a survivor's journal, consistent with DSK's recurring motif of anonymous survivors documenting horrors they barely escaped. The description maps directly to what the art depicts.

A 4/2 with Reach and a death trigger gaining 2 life. Reach is mechanically consistent with the creature's physical form: an extremely long-necked, many-limbed horror that can threaten the air. The death trigger makes it an effective reluctant blocker as well as attacker.
Illustrated by Mathias Kollros, who has illustrated over 380 Magic cards and contributed to Warhammer 40,000 gaming art. His portfolio concentrates in horror and fantasy creature work.

EDHREC rank 18,181 as of Scryfall data pull, among the lowest-inclusion DSK commons in this batch, consistent with its role as a format-filler common without a dedicated Commander strategy requiring it.
